user.description: Enter your beestat API key. You can generate one in beestat.io under Settings > API key.

error.rate_limit: Beestat is rate-limiting requests. Wait a minute and try again.
error.no_thermostats: API key is valid but no thermostats are linked to this beestat account.

abort.already_configured: This beestat account is already configured.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force-refresh live and summary data from beestat.

backfill_history.name: Backfill history
backfill_history.description: Pull 5-minute interval thermostat and sensor history from beestat and import it into Home Assistant long-term statistics. Beestat caps each call at 31 days; longer ranges are chunked automatically.

days.name: Days
days.description: How many days back from now to backfill. Defaults to 30.

thermostat_id.name: Thermostat ID
thermostat_id.description: Optional: restrict backfill to a single thermostat by its beestat thermostat_id. Omit to backfill every thermostat.
